entries.title: Optimize before proving correctness
entries.symptom: Reasoning focuses on computation reuse instead of correctness.
entries.fix: First prove the decision is always safe, then optimize.
entries.note: Provenance inferred during the 2026-07-21 catalog backfill: matches OBS-002's recorded main_mistake ('Initially focused on implementation before identifying the minimal state'); no explicit source field survived the pre-migration schema.

entries.title: Change initialization before questioning iteration
entries.symptom: Counterexample leads to changing initial state immediately.
entries.fix: Inspect loop boundaries, recurrence, initialization, and return value separately.
entries.note: Provenance inferred during the 2026-07-21 catalog backfill: same OBS-001 initialization-discipline family as M003 (corrected by the OBS-001 R2 recall on 2026-07-16); no explicit source field survived the pre-migration schema.

entries.title: Initialize with invalid neutral value
entries.symptom: Uses a convenient neutral value even when the invariant requires every tracked value to represent a real candidate.
entries.fix: Before choosing initial values, verify that each initialized state satisfies the invariant and survives edge cases such as all-negative arrays.

entries.title: Commit the jump at the newly found frontier
entries.symptom: Uses the farthest reachable index as the jump-commit boundary, so a jump is committed before the current region has been fully scanned.
entries.fix: Commit when the scan reaches the end of the current region, not when it reaches the farthest index found so far. The farthest index is evidence gathered while scanning; the region boundary is what decides. Region expansion and jump commitment are separate events.

entries.title: Widen only one variable against overflow
entries.symptom: Encoding arithmetic overflowed int: only the stack element type was widened, leaving other variables in the same expression as int.
entries.fix: When an expression can exceed the value type's range, widen every variable that participates in it, not just the container. Reason about the intermediate range of the whole expression (here 2*min-prev), not the inputs alone.
